steps.t: The trees at Shádhag may have been corrupted by the blight creeping into Kighân from Adagím.
Ulishár said he would wait for you at the village of Sormedân, to the south.
Glorfindel is at the village of Sormedân.
Inkanûsh is at the village of Sormedân.
Khâwaz at the village of Sormedân is reluctant to speak to you, but might be convinced.
Villagers of Sormedân are frightened of Glorfindel, and need reassurance that he is a friend and can be trusted.
Villagers of Sormedân are frightened of Glorfindel, and need reassurance that he is a friend and can be trusted.
Khâwaz at the village of Sormedân has something to say to you.
